kingdom.long_description: Great stonecarvers of the Darkmines ventured through a portal gate, from deep in the Magma Underworld. The Northern Alliance welcomes them into their fold, bringing warmth to the frigid north.

no_dwarf_buff_night.description: Dwarf isn't receiving Dwarf Vigilance buff.

vigil_night_buff.description: Dwarf will skip sleeping for a night.

use_beard_cloth.description: Use this item on a citizen.

bulletin_message.000:
The Darkmine Dwarves arrived through this portal gate from their Magma Underworld.

Oh, look what else came through?!
An Egg, and it's ready to hatch!

intro.title: A New Beard?
intro.message:
The beard cloth has been prepared for use, right now.
Will you use it to form a new beard for a Dwarf? Otherwise, it will be discarded.

quest.title: The New Beard
quest.text: Select a Dwarf who will change their beard.

happy_miner.tooltip: Strike the earth with joy! Find the treasures in the dark and secret places below.

iron_battle_axe_recipe.description: Extra large for when you need some extra punch.
iron_battle_axe_recipe.flavor: 'Are these all of them?' shouted Rovnar 'They might as well make a line'

steel_axe_recipe.description: Very good for hacking and slashing.
steel_axe_recipe.flavor: '...and one hearthling after the other they all drew their axes above the shieldwall.' - The Valin Saga

dark_knight_armor_recipe.description: Advanced Armor alternative for a Darkmine Dwarf Knight.

dragoon_armor_recipe.description: Advanced Armor alternative for a Darkmine Dwarf Footman.

level_1_data.hunting_perk_description: A Darkmine Dwarf Footman is naturally adept at animal tracking, and can hunt animals for food and other resources.

dwarf_hunt_dash_buff.description: Quickly chases after feral animal prey

large_urn_coal_recipe.description: For compactly storing up to 32 items
large_urn_coal_recipe.flavor: Once we put things in, how will we get them out? Don't think about it too much

tile_floor_mosaic_coal_recipe.flavor: Step over the painted flowers, and give thanks

beard_cloth_recipe.description: Used to form a new beard.
beard_cloth_recipe.flavor: Sometimes, a Dwarven woman also wants to wear a nice beard.

rug_gilded_coal_recipe.description: Skillfully woven from dyed and golden threads
rug_gilded_coal_recipe.flavor: The color is milled from coal chunks found deep within mountain mines.

rug_gilded_copper_recipe.description: Skillfully woven from dyed and golden threads
rug_gilded_copper_recipe.flavor: The color is milled from copper ore found deep within mountain mines.

rug_gilded_gold_recipe.description: Skillfully woven from dyed and golden threads
rug_gilded_gold_recipe.flavor: The color is milled from gold ore found deep within mountain mines.

rug_gilded_silver_recipe.description: Skillfully woven from dyed and golden threads
rug_gilded_silver_recipe.flavor: The color is milled from silver ore found deep within mountain mines.

ale_drink.description: Always have a cup of Ale on hand.

beard_cloth.description: Gives your chosen Dwarf a new beard.

portal_gate_ghost.description: One way travel device. Arrivals came from the Underworld in another Universe.

rug_gilded_coal_ghost.description: Skillfully woven from dyed and golden threads

rug_gilded_copper_ghost.description: Skillfully woven from dyed and golden threads

rug_gilded_gold_ghost.description: Skillfully woven from dyed and golden threads

rug_gilded_silver_ghost.description: Skillfully woven from dyed and golden threads

iron_battle_axe.description: Extra large for when you need some extra punch. (Two-handed)

steel_axe.description: For hacking and slashing to victory.
